chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of the Magians (zoroastrians)

text: 5754 - مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنِ اِبْنِ أُذَيْنَةَ : "فِي اَلنِّسَاءِ إِذَا كَانَ لَهُنَّ وَلَدٌ أُعْطِينَ مِنَ اَلرِّبَاعِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5754 - Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr narrated from Ibn Udhayna:
"In the case of women, if they have a child, they are given from the inheritance of property."
